# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: my-vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true

- name: default-subnet-us-central1-a
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24

- name: default-subnet-us-central1-b
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24

- name: default-subnet-us-central1-c
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.2.0/24

outputs:
  vpcSelfLink:
    value: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
  subnetUsCentral1A:
    value: $(ref.default-subnet-us-central1-a.selfLink)
  subnetUsCentral1B:
    value: $(ref.default-subnet-us-central1-b.selfLink)
  subnetUsCentral1C:
    value: $(ref.default-subnet-us-central1-c.selfLink)
